social_proof.title: Numbers with context, not generic promises.

metrics.label: Increase in lead conversion
metrics.context: E-commerce, WhatsApp + web, versus manual handling

metrics.label: Weeks to go live
metrics.context: Standard setup, no custom integrations; enterprise 2–4 months

social_proof.quote: StaffDigital AI completely transformed our patient care. We went from missing calls to handling 100% of interactions with the same quality — even after hours.
social_proof.case_study_challenge: They were losing 40% of calls outside business hours and wait times exceeded 8 minutes.
social_proof.case_study_solution: AI agent with human voice for 24/7 phone support integrated with their appointment system.
social_proof.case_study_result: 0 missed calls. Response time reduced to 12 seconds. +35% in confirmed bookings.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about AI agents
faq.subtitle: We answer your questions about implementation, privacy and how AI agents work

items.q: Does the AI agent really sound human?
items.a: Yes. We use proprietary human voice technology with voices indistinguishable from real people. Your customers don't know they're talking to AI.
Between 2 and 6 weeks, depending on complexity. We handle everything — you just give us access.

items.q: What do I need to provide?
items.a: Access to your CRM (if any), information about your products/services and access to channels (WhatsApp, etc.). We do the rest.

items.q: What if the agent can't answer?
items.a: It transfers the conversation to a human on your team with full interaction context. No information is ever lost.
Own infrastructure in the EU, designed to facilitate GDPR compliance. The data is yours.

items.q: Do I need a technical team?
items.a: No. We configure, manage and maintain everything. Your business just needs to use the service.

cta.microcopy: Custom-built. Fully managed. Designed for real operations.

welcome.title: Your AI command centre

contact_enrichment.description: Email and company auto-detected by AI. Fields fill themselves — notice the ✨ icon next to each field.

lifecycle.title: From lead to customer
lifecycle.description: Lifecycle stage updates automatically: New Lead → Hot Lead → Customer. The AI decides based on the conversation.

booking.title: Automatic scheduling
booking.description: The AI agent suggests available slots and books the meeting automatically. Cal.com integration included.

team_handoff.title: Smart team handoff
team_handoff.description: When the lead is qualified, the AI notifies your sales team (@Sales team) with full conversation context.

crm.title: Integrated CRM
crm.description: Deal created automatically in the CRM with estimated value and pipeline stage. No manual data entry.

ai_agents.title: AI agents working 24/7
ai_agents.description: The AI Sales Agent handles 50+ simultaneous conversations. No queues, no wait times, no limited hours.

reports.title: Real-time metrics
reports.description: Dashboard with conversations handled, resolution rate, response time and weekly activity. Everything measurable.

settings.title: Simple configuration
settings.description: Channels, languages, CRM and calendar — all configured and managed by our team. You just see results.

multilanguage.title: Multilingual support
multilanguage.description: The AI detects the customer's language and responds accordingly. Spanish, Portuguese, English and more — automatically.

cta_final.title: Ready to transform your customer service?

how_it_works.title: How StaffDigital AI works
how_it_works.subtitle: Every interaction becomes context, decision, and action — connected to your business processes.

steps.label: Receive
steps.description: Voice, chat, forms, APIs or system inputs.
steps.card_text: Receives interactions from any touchpoint — calls, WhatsApp, web forms or APIs — and unifies them into a structured flow.
steps.card_example: Incoming call → transcribed → data extracted → flow initiated

steps.label: Understand
steps.description: Context, intent, history and structured data.
steps.card_text: Analyzes language, detects intent, cross-references contact history and structures information for decision-making.
steps.card_example: "I want to reschedule" → intent: reschedule → context: appt #4521

steps.label: Decide
steps.card_text: Applies business rules, conditional logic and configured objectives to determine the best action in each case.

steps.label: Execute
steps.description: Respond, schedule, update, notify or escalate.
steps.card_text: Executes the decided action — responds to the user, updates systems, books appointments, sends notifications or escalates to a human.
steps.card_example: Appointment rescheduled → SMS sent → CRM updated → case closed

how_it_works.closing: It doesn't respond like an isolated system. It turns every interaction into an action connected to the business.
how_it_works.example1: Call → transcribed → data extracted → flow started
how_it_works.example4: SMS sent → CRM updated → case closed

differentiation.text: StaffDigital AI is not a plug-and-play tool. It's a fully customized operational layer designed around how your business actually works.
points: Tailored to your processes and workflows
No technical team required on your side
differentiation.comparison_subtitle: Most AI solutions give you a tool and leave you on your own. We configure, integrate and operate everything for you.
comparison_generic_items: DIY setup with no real support
differentiation.comparison_cta_text: No commitments. No lock-in. Implementation included.

voice.text: Our AI agents communicate with real human voice — impossible to distinguish from a person. Ideal for scenarios where trust and clarity are critical.
voice.transcript_preview: Good morning, thank you for calling Horizonte Clinic. I'm Laura, your virtual assistant. I see you have an appointment scheduled for tomorrow at 10. Would you like to confirm it or need to reschedule?
voice.microcopy: Voice is not the core. It's the multiplier.
